commands.review_summary:
This PR applies secret-shaped tool-payload redaction to exec, process, node-host, live update, and active process reference results, with fake-secret regression coverage.

PR surface: Source +64, Tests +503. Total +567 across 14 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level. Current main still routes exec/process stdout, stderr, aggregate output, node-host output, and live-update tails into returned tool-result or update payloads before local tool-payload redaction; the linked issue also reports fake-canary confirmation in shipped releases.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The remaining action is maintainer/security acceptance of the default-redaction compatibility tradeoff, not a narrow author-side code repair after the latest head redacts active process references.
